data.title: Many Peaks Minerals Announces General Meeting for Shareholders
data.description:
An update from Many Peaks Gold Ltd. ( (AU:MPK) ) is now available.

Many Peaks Minerals Limited has announced a General Meeting for its shareholders to be held on May 23, 2025, at Liberty Offices in West Perth. Shareholders are encouraged to participate either in person, by proxy, or through an authorized representative. The company emphasizes the importance of lodging proxy forms in advance and submitting questions ahead of the meeting to allow management to prepare responses. The meeting’s outcome could impact shareholder interests and company operations, highlighting the significance of shareholder engagement in the decision-making process.

More about Many Peaks Gold Ltd.

Many Peaks Minerals Limited is a company operating in the mining industry, focusing on the exploration and development of mineral resources.

Average Trading Volume: 417,075

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

data.title: QMines Ltd. Proposes Share Issuance to Resources & Energy Group
data.description:
QMines Ltd. ( (AU:QML) ) has issued an announcement.

QMines Ltd. has issued an addendum to its Notice of General Meeting, introducing a new Resolution 5 which seeks approval to issue up to 33,000,000 shares to Resources & Energy Group Limited. This move is part of the company’s strategic efforts to expand its resource base and potentially enhance its market positioning. The resolution is subject to shareholder approval, and specific voting exclusions apply to ensure fairness and compliance with listing rules.

More about QMines Ltd.

QMines Ltd. operates in the mining industry, focusing on the exploration and development of mineral resources. The company is primarily involved in extracting and processing minerals, with a market focus on expanding its resource base and enhancing shareholder value.

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

data.title: Kalcon Investments Increases Stake in Sultan Resources
data.description:
An update from Sultan Resources Ltd. ( (AU:SLZ) ) is now available.

Kalcon Investments Pty Ltd has increased its stake in Sultan Resources Ltd, a company involved in the exploration and development of mineral resources, by acquiring an additional 2,500,000 ordinary shares. This acquisition raises Kalcon’s voting power in Sultan Resources from 5.71% to 6.8%, indicating a stronger influence in the company’s decision-making processes.

data.title: Pier 12 Capital Limited Announces Name Change and Strategic Adjustments
data.description:
Auctus Investment Group Limited ( (AU:AVC) ) has shared an announcement.

Pier 12 Capital Limited, formerly known as Auctus Investment Group Limited, has announced a change in its company name following shareholder approval. The company’s ASX ticker will remain as AVC until its proposed delisting on May 8, 2025. This name change is part of the company’s strategic adjustments, potentially impacting its market presence and stakeholder engagement.

More about Auctus Investment Group Limited

Pier 12 Capital Limited is a global investment manager listed on the ASX, managing over A$550 million in assets. The company focuses on private equity, infrastructure, and private real estate investments, targeting sectors with strong growth potential. It provides investment opportunities for wholesale, Family Office, and sophisticated investors.

data.title: Gold 50 Ltd. Advances Drilling and Strategic Mineral Exploration in the USA
data.description:
An announcement from Gold 50 Ltd. ( (AU:G50) ) is now available.

Gold 50 Ltd. has commenced significant drilling activities at its Golconda Project in Arizona and White Caps Project in Nevada. The Phase 2 RC drilling at Golconda aims to explore high-grade gallium and precious metals, while initial mineralogy and metallurgical test work has begun to assess gallium recovery methods. The White Caps Project saw the completion of a maiden RC drilling program targeting low-grade gold. The recent executive order by President Trump to boost American mineral production is expected to positively impact the Golconda Project, aligning with the company’s focus on strategic minerals for military readiness. This has attracted interest from potential partners and the Defense Department, emphasizing the importance of a domestic supply chain for strategic metals amid geopolitical tensions.

More about Gold 50 Ltd.

Gold 50 Ltd. operates in the mining industry, focusing on the exploration and development of strategic minerals and precious metals. The company is actively engaged in projects in Arizona and Nevada, targeting high-grade gallium and precious metals, with a particular emphasis on creating a domestic supply chain for strategic minerals in the USA.

YTD Price Performance: -37.50%

Average Trading Volume: 201,750

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

data.description:

data.title: Daikokutenbussan Co. Announces Change in Controlling Shareholder Structure
data.description:
Daikokutenbussan Co ( (JP:2791) ) has provided an update.

Daikokutenbussan Co., Ltd. announced a change in its controlling shareholder structure, as its major shareholder and Representative Director, Shoji Oga, plans to transfer some of his shares to SHICHIFUKUJIN Co., LTD., his asset management company. This move indicates a strategic shift in shareholding, potentially impacting the company’s governance and stakeholder dynamics.

More about Daikokutenbussan Co

Daikokutenbussan Co., Ltd. operates in the retail industry and is listed on the Tokyo Stock Exchange Prime Market. The company is involved in the distribution of various consumer goods.

data.title: Commonwealth Bank of Australia Becomes Substantial Holder in SiteMinder
data.description:
The latest update is out from SiteMinder Limited ( (AU:SDR) ).

SiteMinder Limited has announced that the Commonwealth Bank of Australia (CBA) has become a substantial holder in the company as of April 15, 2025. CBA and its related bodies corporate now hold a 5.18% voting power in SiteMinder, which may influence the company’s governance and strategic decisions. This development could have implications for SiteMinder’s market positioning and stakeholder dynamics, given CBA’s significant influence in the financial sector.

data.title: Mineros S.A. Appoints Augusto López Valencia as Chairman to Strengthen Strategic Vision
data.description:
Mineros SA ( (TSE:MSA) ) just unveiled an update.

Mineros S.A. has appointed Augusto López Valencia as the new Chairman of the Board of Directors, marking a significant step in the company’s strategic vision following Sun Valley Investments’ involvement as a shareholder. López Valencia, a respected business leader with over five decades of experience, is expected to enhance Mineros’ commitment to responsible mining, innovation, and governance, aligning with shareholder and community expectations.

More about Mineros SA

Mineros S.A. is a Latin American gold mining company headquartered in Medellin, Colombia, with a diversified asset base including mines in Colombia and Nicaragua. The company focuses on safety and sustainability, has extensive experience in mining and corporate development, and is committed to maximizing shareholder value.
